decisions.rationale: Duplicate OnboardingScaleAnswer/OnboardingScaleQuestion interface blocks in onboardingQuestions.ts are harmless compile-time noise (TypeScript merges identical declarations). ENUM-02 scope is Bubble-faithful enum extraction and component wiring — not file hygiene. All ACs pass (criteria_audit pass, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true); no downstream depends_on gate (e.g. AUTH-04) requires deduplication before advance. Remove the second block at lines 448–461 as low-risk polish in a later pass or alongside the next edit to that file.

ENUM-02 AC-3 requires onboarding questionnaire components to import Q/A from centralized enum modules — satisfied: getPerformanceQuestionsForRole selects the correct role-keyed question set (FV-ENUM-02-2 pass). Step shell heading copy ('How you're showing up professionally') is static UI polish, not a named ui_ref or AC requirement for this item. AUTH-04-onboarding-profile-questions (depends_on ENUM-02) owns onboarding question panel UI migration from Bubble bTGNJ subtree including role-appropriate presentation; per-role performance step titles can land there or in a dedicated consumer copy pass. criteria_audit and functional audits all pass.

Performance answer slugs with Bubble duplicate-disambiguation suffixes (e.g. quickly0, more0) are intentional: AC-2 requires exporting question/answer pairs sourced from customer_performance_answer_os with IR-accurate labels and traceable keys. Slugs mirror Bubble db_value keys for migration fidelity; labels are correct per independent verification (226 bubbleIds cross-checked, 0 missing). Normalizing slugs would reduce traceability and is out of ENUM-02 scope unless a future Supabase schema or API adapter item explicitly requires cleaner keys — document at adapter time if needed.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass, prior blocker C-1 (25 performance questions) resolved. Deferred: C-1 duplicate interface cleanup (code-quality polish, out of ENUM-02 AC scope); C-2 role-adaptive performance step heading (land in AUTH-04 or consumer UI wave). Accepted: C-3 Bubble-faithful answer slugs are correct traceability per AC-2, not a defect.
